CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2019 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue And Sanctions Pursuant Ccp Section 396b(B) And Memorandum In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT AMANDEEP THIARA's Motion To Transfer Venue And Sanctions Pursuant Ccp Section 396b(B).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT AMANDEEP THIARA's Motion To Transfer Venue And Sanctions Pursuant CCP Section 396b(B) is off calendar. Dismissal of entire action entered on August 22, 2019.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT AMANDEEP THIARA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT AMANDEEP THIARA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. Dismissal of entire action entered on August 22, 2019.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EPS)
